metadata.description: Evaluation test set for text-to-SQL pipeline. 200 test cases at three difficulty levels, all distinct from the 8 few-shot examples in contexts.yml.

test_cases.question: How many stations are there in the database?
test_cases.gold_sql: SELECT COUNT(*) AS station_count FROM station;

test_cases.question: List the names and cities of all stations in Mountain View.
test_cases.gold_sql: SELECT name, city FROM station WHERE city = 'Mountain View';

test_cases.question: What is the earliest station installation date?
test_cases.gold_sql: SELECT MIN(installation_date) AS earliest_date FROM station;

test_cases.question: How many distinct cities have bike stations?
test_cases.gold_sql: SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT city) AS city_count FROM station;

test_cases.question: What is the longest trip duration in seconds?
test_cases.gold_sql: SELECT MAX(duration) AS max_duration FROM trip;

test_cases.question: List all distinct subscription types from the trips.
test_cases.gold_sql: SELECT DISTINCT subscription_type FROM trip;

test_cases.question: What is the total number of trips in the database?
test_cases.gold_sql: SELECT COUNT(*) AS trip_count FROM trip;

test_cases.question: What is the shortest trip duration in seconds?
test_cases.gold_sql: SELECT MIN(duration) AS min_duration FROM trip;

test_cases.question: What is the average trip duration?
test_cases.gold_sql: SELECT ROUND(AVG(duration), 2) AS avg_duration FROM trip;

test_cases.question: How many trips were taken by subscribers?
test_cases.gold_sql: SELECT COUNT(*) AS subscriber_trips FROM trip WHERE subscription_type = 'Subscriber';

test_cases.question: List all station names in San Francisco.
test_cases.gold_sql: SELECT name FROM station WHERE city = 'San Francisco';

test_cases.question: What is the maximum dock count among all stations?
test_cases.gold_sql: SELECT MAX(dock_count) AS max_docks FROM station;

test_cases.question: How many stations are in Palo Alto?
test_cases.gold_sql: SELECT COUNT(*) AS station_count FROM station WHERE city = 'Palo Alto';

test_cases.question: What is the latest station installation date?
test_cases.gold_sql: SELECT MAX(installation_date) AS latest_date FROM station;

test_cases.question: How many trips have zip code 94107?
test_cases.gold_sql: SELECT COUNT(*) AS trip_count FROM trip WHERE zip_code = '94107';

test_cases.question: What is the total duration of all trips in seconds?
test_cases.gold_sql: SELECT SUM(duration) AS total_duration FROM trip;

test_cases.question: How many distinct zip codes are in the trip table?
test_cases.gold_sql: SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT zip_code) AS zip_count FROM trip;

test_cases.question: How many distinct bike IDs are in the trip table?
test_cases.gold_sql: SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT bike_id) AS bike_count FROM trip;

test_cases.question: What is the minimum dock count among all stations?
test_cases.gold_sql: SELECT MIN(dock_count) AS min_docks FROM station;

test_cases.question: How many stations are in Redwood City?
test_cases.gold_sql: SELECT COUNT(*) AS station_count FROM station WHERE city = 'Redwood City';

test_cases.question: What is the highest maximum temperature recorded in the weather table?
test_cases.gold_sql: SELECT MAX(max_temperature_f) AS highest_temp FROM weather;

test_cases.question: What is the lowest minimum temperature recorded?
test_cases.gold_sql: SELECT MIN(min_temperature_f) AS lowest_temp FROM weather;

test_cases.question: How many weather records are there in the database?
test_cases.gold_sql: SELECT COUNT(*) AS record_count FROM weather;

test_cases.question: List all distinct weather event types.
test_cases.gold_sql: SELECT DISTINCT events FROM weather;

test_cases.question: How many distinct zip codes are in the weather table?
test_cases.gold_sql: SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT zip_code) AS zip_count FROM weather;

test_cases.question: What is the average dock count across all stations?
test_cases.gold_sql: SELECT ROUND(AVG(dock_count), 2) AS avg_docks FROM station;

test_cases.question: How many trips started from station 50?
test_cases.gold_sql: SELECT COUNT(*) AS trip_count FROM trip WHERE start_station_id = 50;

test_cases.question: List the name and city of the station with ID 69.
test_cases.gold_sql: SELECT name, city FROM station WHERE id = 69;

test_cases.question: How many trips ended at station 70?
test_cases.gold_sql: SELECT COUNT(*) AS trip_count FROM trip WHERE end_station_id = 70;

test_cases.question: What is the total number of status records in the database?
test_cases.gold_sql: SELECT COUNT(*) AS status_count FROM status;

test_cases.question: What is the maximum number of bikes available recorded at any station?
test_cases.gold_sql: SELECT MAX(bikes_available) AS max_bikes FROM status;

test_cases.question: How many trips were taken by customers?
test_cases.gold_sql: SELECT COUNT(*) AS customer_trips FROM trip WHERE subscription_type = 'Customer';

test_cases.question: What is the average mean humidity recorded in the weather table?
test_cases.gold_sql: SELECT ROUND(AVG(mean_humidity), 2) AS avg_humidity FROM weather;

test_cases.question: List the names of all stations in San Jose.
test_cases.gold_sql: SELECT name FROM station WHERE city = 'San Jose';

test_cases.question: What is the maximum wind speed ever recorded?
test_cases.gold_sql: SELECT MAX(max_wind_speed_mph) AS max_wind FROM weather;

test_cases.question: How many stations are in each city?
test_cases.gold_sql: SELECT city, COUNT(*) AS station_count FROM station GROUP BY city ORDER BY station_count DESC;

test_cases.question: What is the total number of trips for each subscription type?
test_cases.gold_sql: SELECT subscription_type, COUNT(*) AS trip_count FROM trip GROUP BY subscription_type;

test_cases.question: What is the average dock count per city?
test_cases.gold_sql: SELECT city, ROUND(AVG(dock_count), 2) AS avg_dock_count FROM station GROUP BY city;

test_cases.question: Find the top 5 stations with the highest dock count.
test_cases.gold_sql: SELECT name, dock_count FROM station ORDER BY dock_count DESC LIMIT 5;

test_cases.question: How many trips started in each month of 2015?
test_cases.gold_sql: SELECT EXTRACT(MONTH FROM start_date) AS month, COUNT(*) AS trip_count FROM trip WHERE EXTRACT(YEAR FROM start_date) = 2015 GROUP BY month ORDER BY month;

test_cases.question: What was the average mean temperature grouped by zip code?
test_cases.gold_sql: SELECT zip_code, ROUND(AVG(mean_temperature_f), 2) AS avg_temp FROM weather GROUP BY zip_code;

test_cases.question: How many weather records had any precipitation?
test_cases.gold_sql: SELECT COUNT(*) AS rainy_days FROM weather WHERE precipitation_inches != '0' AND precipitation_inches != '';

test_cases.question: What are the top 3 most common zip codes in the trip table?
test_cases.gold_sql: SELECT zip_code, COUNT(*) AS trip_count FROM trip GROUP BY zip_code ORDER BY trip_count DESC LIMIT 3;

test_cases.question: How many stations were installed in each year?
test_cases.gold_sql: SELECT EXTRACT(YEAR FROM installation_date) AS year, COUNT(*) AS station_count FROM station GROUP BY year ORDER BY year;

test_cases.question: What is the average maximum temperature for each month across all years?
test_cases.gold_sql: SELECT EXTRACT(MONTH FROM date) AS month, ROUND(AVG(max_temperature_f), 2) AS avg_max_temp FROM weather GROUP BY month ORDER BY month;

test_cases.question: List the top 10 longest trips by duration.
test_cases.gold_sql: SELECT id, duration, start_station_id, end_station_id FROM trip ORDER BY duration DESC LIMIT 10;

test_cases.question: What is the total number of trips per zip code?
test_cases.gold_sql: SELECT zip_code, COUNT(*) AS trip_count FROM trip GROUP BY zip_code ORDER BY trip_count DESC;

test_cases.question: Which city has the most stations?
test_cases.gold_sql: SELECT city, COUNT(*) AS station_count FROM station GROUP BY city ORDER BY station_count DESC LIMIT 1;

test_cases.question: What is the average number of bikes available per station ID?
test_cases.gold_sql: SELECT station_id, ROUND(AVG(bikes_available), 2) AS avg_bikes FROM status GROUP BY station_id ORDER BY avg_bikes DESC;

test_cases.question: How many trips started in each year?
test_cases.gold_sql: SELECT EXTRACT(YEAR FROM start_date) AS year, COUNT(*) AS trip_count FROM trip GROUP BY year ORDER BY year;

test_cases.question: Find the stations with dock count greater than 20.
test_cases.gold_sql: SELECT id, name, dock_count FROM station WHERE dock_count > 20 ORDER BY dock_count DESC, id;

test_cases.question: What is the average trip duration for trips with zip code 94107?
test_cases.gold_sql: SELECT ROUND(AVG(duration), 2) AS avg_duration FROM trip WHERE zip_code = '94107';

test_cases.question: How many trips lasted more than one hour?
test_cases.gold_sql: SELECT COUNT(*) AS long_trips FROM trip WHERE duration > 3600;

test_cases.question: What is the total dock count per city?
test_cases.gold_sql: SELECT city, SUM(dock_count) AS total_docks FROM station GROUP BY city ORDER BY total_docks DESC;

test_cases.question: List the stations installed in August 2013.
test_cases.gold_sql: SELECT name, city, installation_date FROM station WHERE EXTRACT(YEAR FROM installation_date) = 2013 AND EXTRACT(MONTH FROM installation_date) = 8 ORDER BY installation_date;

test_cases.question: What are the top 5 busiest start stations by trip count?
test_cases.gold_sql: SELECT start_station_id, COUNT(*) AS trip_count FROM trip GROUP BY start_station_id ORDER BY trip_count DESC LIMIT 5;

test_cases.question: What is the average docks available per station ID?
test_cases.gold_sql: SELECT station_id, ROUND(AVG(docks_available), 2) AS avg_docks FROM status GROUP BY station_id ORDER BY avg_docks DESC;

test_cases.question: How many days had a maximum temperature above 90 degrees?
test_cases.gold_sql: SELECT COUNT(*) AS hot_days FROM weather WHERE max_temperature_f > 90;

test_cases.question: What is the average mean wind speed by zip code?
test_cases.gold_sql: SELECT zip_code, ROUND(AVG(mean_wind_speed_mph), 2) AS avg_wind FROM weather GROUP BY zip_code;

test_cases.question: Find the top 5 busiest end stations by trip count.
test_cases.gold_sql: SELECT end_station_id, COUNT(*) AS trip_count FROM trip GROUP BY end_station_id ORDER BY trip_count DESC LIMIT 5;

test_cases.question: How many trips were taken each day of the week?
test_cases.gold_sql: SELECT EXTRACT(DOW FROM start_date) AS day_of_week, COUNT(*) AS trip_count FROM trip GROUP BY day_of_week ORDER BY day_of_week;

test_cases.question: What is the average cloud cover by zip code?
test_cases.gold_sql: SELECT zip_code, ROUND(AVG(cloud_cover), 2) AS avg_cloud FROM weather GROUP BY zip_code;

test_cases.question: Which zip codes had the most weather event days?
test_cases.gold_sql: SELECT zip_code, COUNT(*) AS event_count FROM weather WHERE events IS NOT NULL AND events != '' GROUP BY zip_code ORDER BY event_count DESC;

test_cases.question: How many trips had the same start and end station?
test_cases.gold_sql: SELECT COUNT(*) AS round_trips FROM trip WHERE start_station_id = end_station_id;

test_cases.question: What is the minimum and maximum mean temperature for zip code 94107?
test_cases.gold_sql: SELECT MIN(mean_temperature_f) AS min_temp, MAX(mean_temperature_f) AS max_temp FROM weather WHERE zip_code = '94107';

test_cases.question: List the bike IDs with more than 40 trips.
test_cases.gold_sql: SELECT bike_id, COUNT(*) AS trip_count FROM trip GROUP BY bike_id HAVING COUNT(*) > 40 ORDER BY trip_count DESC;

test_cases.question: What is the average trip duration per month across all years?
test_cases.gold_sql: SELECT EXTRACT(MONTH FROM start_date) AS month, ROUND(AVG(duration), 2) AS avg_duration FROM trip GROUP BY month ORDER BY month;

test_cases.question: How many stations have a dock count of exactly 15?
test_cases.gold_sql: SELECT COUNT(*) AS station_count FROM station WHERE dock_count = 15;

test_cases.question: What are the distinct weather events recorded for zip code 94107?
test_cases.gold_sql: SELECT DISTINCT events FROM weather WHERE zip_code = '94107';

test_cases.question: Find the average maximum humidity per month.
test_cases.gold_sql: SELECT EXTRACT(MONTH FROM date) AS month, ROUND(AVG(max_humidity), 2) AS avg_max_humidity FROM weather GROUP BY month ORDER BY month;

test_cases.question: List the names of start stations for trips with duration longer than 1000 seconds.
test_cases.gold_sql: SELECT DISTINCT s.name FROM trip t JOIN station s ON t.start_station_id = s.id WHERE t.duration > 1000;

test_cases.question: For each city, what is the average trip duration for trips starting from stations in that city?
test_cases.gold_sql: SELECT s.city, ROUND(AVG(t.duration), 2) AS avg_duration FROM trip t JOIN station s ON t.start_station_id = s.id GROUP BY s.city;

test_cases.question: Which station had the highest average number of bikes available?
test_cases.gold_sql: SELECT s.name, ROUND(AVG(st.bikes_available), 2) AS avg_bikes FROM status st JOIN station s ON st.station_id = s.id GROUP BY s.name ORDER BY avg_bikes DESC LIMIT 1;

test_cases.question: What is the total number of trips on days when the max temperature exceeded 80 degrees in zip code 94107?
test_cases.gold_sql: SELECT COUNT(*) AS trip_count FROM trip t JOIN weather w ON t.zip_code = w.zip_code AND CAST(t.start_date AS DATE) = w.date WHERE w.max_temperature_f > 80 AND w.zip_code = '94107';

test_cases.question: Find the station name that had the most trips starting from it.
test_cases.gold_sql: SELECT s.name, COUNT(t.id) AS trip_count FROM trip t JOIN station s ON t.start_station_id = s.id GROUP BY s.name ORDER BY trip_count DESC LIMIT 1;

test_cases.question: Which city had the most trips starting from its stations?
test_cases.gold_sql: SELECT s.city, COUNT(t.id) AS trip_count FROM trip t JOIN station s ON t.start_station_id = s.id GROUP BY s.city ORDER BY trip_count DESC LIMIT 1;

test_cases.question: What is the average trip duration for trips starting and ending in different cities?
test_cases.gold_sql: SELECT ROUND(AVG(t.duration), 2) AS avg_duration FROM trip t JOIN station s1 ON t.start_station_id = s1.id JOIN station s2 ON t.end_station_id = s2.id WHERE s1.city != s2.city;

test_cases.question: For each start station, what is the average trip duration and total number of trips?
test_cases.gold_sql: SELECT s.name, COUNT(t.id) AS trip_count, ROUND(AVG(t.duration), 2) AS avg_duration FROM trip t JOIN station s ON t.start_station_id = s.id GROUP BY s.name ORDER BY trip_count DESC;

test_cases.question: Which station had the lowest average number of docks available?
test_cases.gold_sql: SELECT s.name, ROUND(AVG(st.docks_available), 2) AS avg_docks FROM status st JOIN station s ON st.station_id = s.id GROUP BY s.name ORDER BY avg_docks ASC LIMIT 1;

test_cases.question: What is the average trip duration on rainy days versus non-rainy days?
test_cases.gold_sql: SELECT CASE WHEN w.events ILIKE '%rain%' THEN 'Rainy' ELSE 'Non-Rainy' END AS weather_type, ROUND(AVG(t.duration), 2) AS avg_duration FROM trip t JOIN weather w ON t.zip_code = w.zip_code AND CAST(t.start_date AS DATE) = w.date GROUP BY weather_type;

test_cases.question: Find the top 3 stations with the most trips ending at them.
test_cases.gold_sql: SELECT s.name, COUNT(t.id) AS trip_count FROM trip t JOIN station s ON t.end_station_id = s.id GROUP BY s.name ORDER BY trip_count DESC LIMIT 3;

test_cases.question: What is the average number of bikes available per city?
test_cases.gold_sql: SELECT s.city, ROUND(AVG(st.bikes_available), 2) AS avg_bikes FROM status st JOIN station s ON st.station_id = s.id GROUP BY s.city ORDER BY avg_bikes DESC;

test_cases.question: How many trips started from stations in each city during 2015?
test_cases.gold_sql: SELECT s.city, COUNT(t.id) AS trip_count FROM trip t JOIN station s ON t.start_station_id = s.id WHERE EXTRACT(YEAR FROM t.start_date) = 2015 GROUP BY s.city ORDER BY trip_count DESC;

test_cases.question: Which station pair (start to end) had the most trips?
test_cases.gold_sql: SELECT s1.name AS start_station, s2.name AS end_station, COUNT(t.id) AS trip_count FROM trip t JOIN station s1 ON t.start_station_id = s1.id JOIN station s2 ON t.end_station_id = s2.id GROUP BY s1.name, s2.name ORDER BY trip_count DESC LIMIT 1;

test_cases.question: What is the average trip duration by weather event type?
test_cases.gold_sql: SELECT w.events, ROUND(AVG(t.duration), 2) AS avg_duration FROM trip t JOIN weather w ON t.zip_code = w.zip_code AND CAST(t.start_date AS DATE) = w.date WHERE w.events IS NOT NULL AND w.events != '' GROUP BY w.events ORDER BY avg_duration DESC;

test_cases.question: For each city, how many trips ended at stations in that city?
test_cases.gold_sql: SELECT s.city, COUNT(t.id) AS trip_count FROM trip t JOIN station s ON t.end_station_id = s.id GROUP BY s.city ORDER BY trip_count DESC;

test_cases.question: Show the daily temperature and trip count for zip code 94107.
test_cases.gold_sql: SELECT w.date, w.mean_temperature_f, COUNT(t.id) AS trip_count FROM weather w JOIN trip t ON w.zip_code = t.zip_code AND w.date = CAST(t.start_date AS DATE) WHERE w.zip_code = '94107' GROUP BY w.date, w.mean_temperature_f ORDER BY w.date;

test_cases.question: Find stations where the average bikes available is greater than 10.
test_cases.gold_sql: SELECT s.id, s.name, ROUND(AVG(st.bikes_available), 2) AS avg_bikes FROM status st JOIN station s ON st.station_id = s.id GROUP BY s.id, s.name HAVING ROUND(AVG(st.bikes_available), 2) > 10 ORDER BY avg_bikes DESC;

test_cases.question: What is the total number of trips per city pair (start city to end city)?
test_cases.gold_sql: SELECT s1.city AS start_city, s2.city AS end_city, COUNT(t.id) AS trip_count FROM trip t JOIN station s1 ON t.start_station_id = s1.id JOIN station s2 ON t.end_station_id = s2.id GROUP BY s1.city, s2.city ORDER BY trip_count DESC;

test_cases.question: What was the average trip duration on days when it rained in zip code 94107?
test_cases.gold_sql: SELECT ROUND(AVG(t.duration), 2) AS avg_duration FROM trip t JOIN weather w ON t.zip_code = w.zip_code AND CAST(t.start_date AS DATE) = w.date WHERE w.events LIKE '%Rain%' AND w.zip_code = '94107';

test_cases.question: Which station had the most round trips (same start and end station)?
test_cases.gold_sql: SELECT s.name, COUNT(t.id) AS round_trip_count FROM trip t JOIN station s ON t.start_station_id = s.id WHERE t.start_station_id = t.end_station_id GROUP BY s.name ORDER BY round_trip_count DESC LIMIT 1;

test_cases.question: What is the average trip duration per subscription type for trips starting from San Francisco stations?
test_cases.gold_sql: SELECT t.subscription_type, ROUND(AVG(t.duration), 2) AS avg_duration FROM trip t JOIN station s ON t.start_station_id = s.id WHERE s.city = 'San Francisco' GROUP BY t.subscription_type;

test_cases.question: Which start station in San Francisco had the longest average trip duration?
test_cases.gold_sql: SELECT s.name, ROUND(AVG(t.duration), 2) AS avg_duration FROM trip t JOIN station s ON t.start_station_id = s.id WHERE s.city = 'San Francisco' GROUP BY s.name ORDER BY avg_duration DESC LIMIT 1;

test_cases.question: How many subscriber and customer trips started from each city?
test_cases.gold_sql: SELECT s.city, t.subscription_type, COUNT(t.id) AS trip_count FROM trip t JOIN station s ON t.start_station_id = s.id GROUP BY s.city, t.subscription_type ORDER BY s.city, t.subscription_type;

test_cases.question: Find the station with the most docks available on average.
test_cases.gold_sql: SELECT s.id, s.name, ROUND(AVG(st.docks_available), 2) AS avg_docks FROM status st JOIN station s ON st.station_id = s.id GROUP BY s.id, s.name ORDER BY avg_docks DESC LIMIT 1;

test_cases.question: What is the average trip duration on hot days (max temp above 80) versus cold days (max temp below 60)?
test_cases.gold_sql: SELECT CASE WHEN w.max_temperature_f > 80 THEN 'Hot' WHEN w.max_temperature_f < 60 THEN 'Cold' END AS temp_category, ROUND(AVG(t.duration), 2) AS avg_duration FROM trip t JOIN weather w ON t.zip_code = w.zip_code AND CAST(t.start_date AS DATE) = w.date WHERE w.max_temperature_f > 80 OR w.max_temperature_f < 60 GROUP BY temp_category;

test_cases.question: For each station, what percentage of trips starting there are by subscribers?
test_cases.gold_sql: SELECT s.name, ROUND(COUNT(CASE WHEN t.subscription_type = 'Subscriber' THEN 1 END) * 100.0 / COUNT(*), 2) AS subscriber_pct FROM trip t JOIN station s ON t.start_station_id = s.id GROUP BY s.name ORDER BY subscriber_pct DESC;

test_cases.question: Which day had the most trips and what was the weather like that day in zip code 94107?
test_cases.gold_sql: SELECT CAST(t.start_date AS DATE) AS trip_date, COUNT(t.id) AS trip_count, w.max_temperature_f, w.events FROM trip t JOIN weather w ON t.zip_code = w.zip_code AND CAST(t.start_date AS DATE) = w.date WHERE w.zip_code = '94107' GROUP BY trip_date, w.max_temperature_f, w.events ORDER BY trip_count DESC LIMIT 1;

test_cases.question: What is the total number of trips between San Francisco and San Jose in both directions?
test_cases.gold_sql: SELECT COUNT(t.id) AS trip_count FROM trip t JOIN station s1 ON t.start_station_id = s1.id JOIN station s2 ON t.end_station_id = s2.id WHERE (s1.city = 'San Francisco' AND s2.city = 'San Jose') OR (s1.city = 'San Jose' AND s2.city = 'San Francisco');

test_cases.question: What is the average number of bikes available at each station by city, for stations with more than 5 average bikes?
test_cases.gold_sql: SELECT s.city, s.name, ROUND(AVG(st.bikes_available), 2) AS avg_bikes FROM status st JOIN station s ON st.station_id = s.id GROUP BY s.city, s.name HAVING ROUND(AVG(st.bikes_available), 2) > 5 ORDER BY s.city, avg_bikes DESC;

test_cases.question: What is the average maximum dew point recorded in the weather table?
test_cases.gold_sql: SELECT ROUND(AVG(max_dew_point_f), 2) AS avg_max_dew FROM weather;

test_cases.question: How many stations have a latitude greater than 37.4?
test_cases.gold_sql: SELECT COUNT(*) AS station_count FROM station WHERE lat > 37.4;

test_cases.question: What is the maximum number of docks available recorded in the status table?
test_cases.gold_sql: SELECT MAX(docks_available) AS max_docks FROM status;

test_cases.question: How many trips used bike ID 100?
test_cases.gold_sql: SELECT COUNT(*) AS trip_count FROM trip WHERE bike_id = 100;

test_cases.question: What is the average minimum humidity recorded in the weather table?
test_cases.gold_sql: SELECT ROUND(AVG(min_humidity), 2) AS avg_min_humidity FROM weather;

test_cases.question: How many weather records have cloud cover greater than 5?
test_cases.gold_sql: SELECT COUNT(*) AS cloudy_days FROM weather WHERE cloud_cover > 5;

test_cases.question: What is the maximum sea level pressure ever recorded?
test_cases.gold_sql: SELECT MAX(max_sea_level_pressure_inches) AS max_pressure FROM weather;

test_cases.question: List the names and dock counts of all stations in Redwood City.
test_cases.gold_sql: SELECT name, dock_count FROM station WHERE city = 'Redwood City';

test_cases.question: What is the average mean visibility in miles across all weather records?
test_cases.gold_sql: SELECT ROUND(AVG(mean_visibility_miles), 2) AS avg_visibility FROM weather;

test_cases.question: What is the minimum number of docks available ever recorded?
test_cases.gold_sql: SELECT MIN(docks_available) AS min_docks FROM status;

test_cases.question: What is the minimum dew point ever recorded?
test_cases.gold_sql: SELECT MIN(min_dew_point_f) AS min_dew FROM weather;

test_cases.question: How many stations have more than 20 docks?
test_cases.gold_sql: SELECT COUNT(*) AS station_count FROM station WHERE dock_count > 20;

test_cases.question: What is the total dock count across all stations?
test_cases.gold_sql: SELECT SUM(dock_count) AS total_docks FROM station;

test_cases.question: How many weather records have wind direction greater than 270 degrees?
test_cases.gold_sql: SELECT COUNT(*) AS record_count FROM weather WHERE wind_dir_degrees > 270;

test_cases.question: What is the average maximum gust speed recorded in the weather table?
test_cases.gold_sql: SELECT ROUND(AVG(max_gust_speed_mph), 2) AS avg_gust FROM weather;

test_cases.question: List all distinct cities in the station table.
test_cases.gold_sql: SELECT DISTINCT city FROM station ORDER BY city;

test_cases.question: How many trips have a duration less than 300 seconds?
test_cases.gold_sql: SELECT COUNT(*) AS short_trips FROM trip WHERE duration < 300;

test_cases.question: What is the maximum mean temperature ever recorded?
test_cases.gold_sql: SELECT MAX(mean_temperature_f) AS max_mean_temp FROM weather;

test_cases.question: How many weather records have events containing fog?
test_cases.gold_sql: SELECT COUNT(*) AS foggy_days FROM weather WHERE events LIKE '%Fog%';

test_cases.question: What is the minimum sea level pressure ever recorded?
test_cases.gold_sql: SELECT MIN(min_sea_level_pressure_inches) AS min_pressure FROM weather;

test_cases.question: How many trips started from station 63?
test_cases.gold_sql: SELECT COUNT(*) AS trip_count FROM trip WHERE start_station_id = 63;

test_cases.question: What is the average wind direction in degrees across all weather records?
test_cases.gold_sql: SELECT ROUND(AVG(wind_dir_degrees), 2) AS avg_wind_dir FROM weather;

test_cases.question: What is the minimum number of bikes available ever recorded at any station?
test_cases.gold_sql: SELECT MIN(bikes_available) AS min_bikes FROM status;

test_cases.question: How many weather records have a minimum temperature below 40 degrees?
test_cases.gold_sql: SELECT COUNT(*) AS cold_days FROM weather WHERE min_temperature_f < 40;

test_cases.question: What is the average maximum visibility in miles?
test_cases.gold_sql: SELECT ROUND(AVG(max_visibility_miles), 2) AS avg_max_vis FROM weather;

test_cases.question: How many distinct start station IDs are in the trip table?
test_cases.gold_sql: SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT start_station_id) AS station_count FROM trip;

test_cases.question: What is the minimum maximum wind speed ever recorded?
test_cases.gold_sql: SELECT MIN(max_wind_speed_mph) AS min_max_wind FROM weather;

test_cases.question: How many trips have a zip code of 94041?
test_cases.gold_sql: SELECT COUNT(*) AS trip_count FROM trip WHERE zip_code = '94041';

test_cases.question: What is the average latitude of all stations?
test_cases.gold_sql: SELECT ROUND(AVG(lat)::numeric, 2) AS avg_lat FROM station;

test_cases.question: How many weather records have maximum humidity equal to 100?
test_cases.gold_sql: SELECT COUNT(*) AS humid_days FROM weather WHERE max_humidity = 100;

test_cases.question: What is the total duration of all trips starting from station 50?
test_cases.gold_sql: SELECT SUM(duration) AS total_duration FROM trip WHERE start_station_id = 50;

test_cases.question: How many distinct end station IDs are in the trip table?
test_cases.gold_sql: SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT end_station_id) AS station_count FROM trip;

test_cases.question: What is the average longitude of all stations?
test_cases.gold_sql: SELECT ROUND(AVG(long)::numeric, 2) AS avg_long FROM station;

test_cases.question: How many weather records were recorded for zip code 94063?
test_cases.gold_sql: SELECT COUNT(*) AS record_count FROM weather WHERE zip_code = '94063';

test_cases.question: What is the minimum mean visibility in miles ever recorded?
test_cases.gold_sql: SELECT MIN(mean_visibility_miles) AS min_vis FROM weather;

test_cases.question: What is the minimum and maximum dock count per city?
test_cases.gold_sql: SELECT city, MIN(dock_count) AS min_docks, MAX(dock_count) AS max_docks FROM station GROUP BY city;

test_cases.question: How many trips started in each quarter of 2015?
test_cases.gold_sql: SELECT EXTRACT(QUARTER FROM start_date) AS quarter, COUNT(*) AS trip_count FROM trip WHERE EXTRACT(YEAR FROM start_date) = 2015 GROUP BY quarter ORDER BY quarter;

test_cases.question: What is the average mean dew point per zip code?
test_cases.gold_sql: SELECT zip_code, ROUND(AVG(mean_dew_point_f), 2) AS avg_dew FROM weather GROUP BY zip_code;

test_cases.question: Find the top 5 most used bike IDs by trip count.
test_cases.gold_sql: SELECT bike_id, COUNT(*) AS trip_count FROM trip GROUP BY bike_id ORDER BY trip_count DESC LIMIT 5;

test_cases.question: How many status records exist per station ID?
test_cases.gold_sql: SELECT station_id, COUNT(*) AS record_count FROM status GROUP BY station_id ORDER BY record_count DESC;

test_cases.question: What is the average maximum temperature for days with rain events?
test_cases.gold_sql: SELECT ROUND(AVG(max_temperature_f), 2) AS avg_temp FROM weather WHERE events ILIKE '%rain%';

test_cases.question: How many trips lasted between 600 and 1800 seconds?
test_cases.gold_sql: SELECT COUNT(*) AS trip_count FROM trip WHERE duration BETWEEN 600 AND 1800;

test_cases.question: What is the total number of trips per subscription type for zip code 94107?
test_cases.gold_sql: SELECT subscription_type, COUNT(*) AS trip_count FROM trip WHERE zip_code = '94107' GROUP BY subscription_type;

test_cases.question: Find the stations with dock count between 15 and 25.
test_cases.gold_sql: SELECT name, city, dock_count FROM station WHERE dock_count BETWEEN 15 AND 25 ORDER BY dock_count;

test_cases.question: What is the average cloud cover per month?
test_cases.gold_sql: SELECT EXTRACT(MONTH FROM date) AS month, ROUND(AVG(cloud_cover), 2) AS avg_cloud FROM weather GROUP BY month ORDER BY month;

test_cases.question: How many distinct bike IDs were used per year?
test_cases.gold_sql: SELECT EXTRACT(YEAR FROM start_date) AS year, COUNT(DISTINCT bike_id) AS bike_count FROM trip GROUP BY year ORDER BY year;

test_cases.question: What is the average, minimum, and maximum trip duration per subscription type?
test_cases.gold_sql: SELECT subscription_type, ROUND(AVG(duration), 2) AS avg_duration, MIN(duration) AS min_duration, MAX(duration) AS max_duration FROM trip GROUP BY subscription_type;

test_cases.question: List the zip codes with more than 100 weather records.
test_cases.gold_sql: SELECT zip_code, COUNT(*) AS record_count FROM weather GROUP BY zip_code HAVING COUNT(*) > 100 ORDER BY record_count DESC;

test_cases.question: What is the average mean humidity per month?
test_cases.gold_sql: SELECT EXTRACT(MONTH FROM date) AS month, ROUND(AVG(mean_humidity), 2) AS avg_humidity FROM weather GROUP BY month ORDER BY month;

test_cases.question: How many trips ended in each month of 2015?
test_cases.gold_sql: SELECT EXTRACT(MONTH FROM end_date) AS month, COUNT(*) AS trip_count FROM trip WHERE EXTRACT(YEAR FROM end_date) = 2015 GROUP BY month ORDER BY month;

test_cases.question: What is the average maximum wind speed per zip code?
test_cases.gold_sql: SELECT zip_code, ROUND(AVG(max_wind_speed_mph), 2) AS avg_max_wind FROM weather GROUP BY zip_code;

test_cases.question: What is the total trip duration per start station for the top 10 stations?
test_cases.gold_sql: SELECT start_station_id, SUM(duration) AS total_duration FROM trip GROUP BY start_station_id ORDER BY total_duration DESC LIMIT 10;

test_cases.question: What is the average number of bikes available per station, for stations with average above 8?
test_cases.gold_sql: SELECT station_id, ROUND(AVG(bikes_available), 2) AS avg_bikes FROM status GROUP BY station_id HAVING ROUND(AVG(bikes_available), 2) > 8 ORDER BY avg_bikes DESC;

test_cases.question: How many weather records had a mean temperature between 60 and 70 degrees?
test_cases.gold_sql: SELECT COUNT(*) AS record_count FROM weather WHERE mean_temperature_f BETWEEN 60 AND 70;

test_cases.question: What is the average sea level pressure per zip code?
test_cases.gold_sql: SELECT zip_code, ROUND(AVG(mean_sea_level_pressure_inches), 2) AS avg_pressure FROM weather GROUP BY zip_code;

test_cases.question: How many trips were taken per month in 2015?
test_cases.gold_sql: SELECT EXTRACT(MONTH FROM start_date) AS month, COUNT(*) AS trip_count FROM trip WHERE EXTRACT(YEAR FROM start_date) = 2015 GROUP BY month ORDER BY month;

test_cases.question: What is the average minimum temperature per month?
test_cases.gold_sql: SELECT EXTRACT(MONTH FROM date) AS month, ROUND(AVG(min_temperature_f), 2) AS avg_min_temp FROM weather GROUP BY month ORDER BY month;

test_cases.question: Find the top 5 end stations by total trip duration.
test_cases.gold_sql: SELECT end_station_id, SUM(duration) AS total_duration FROM trip GROUP BY end_station_id ORDER BY total_duration DESC LIMIT 5;

test_cases.question: How many trips started from each station that has more than 400 trips?
test_cases.gold_sql: SELECT start_station_id, COUNT(*) AS trip_count FROM trip GROUP BY start_station_id HAVING COUNT(*) > 400 ORDER BY trip_count DESC;

test_cases.question: What is the average trip duration per year?
test_cases.gold_sql: SELECT EXTRACT(YEAR FROM start_date) AS year, ROUND(AVG(duration), 2) AS avg_duration FROM trip GROUP BY year ORDER BY year;

test_cases.question: How many days had a minimum temperature below 45 degrees per zip code?
test_cases.gold_sql: SELECT zip_code, COUNT(*) AS cold_days FROM weather WHERE min_temperature_f < 45 GROUP BY zip_code ORDER BY cold_days DESC;

test_cases.question: What is the maximum and minimum mean humidity per zip code?
test_cases.gold_sql: SELECT zip_code, MAX(mean_humidity) AS max_humidity, MIN(mean_humidity) AS min_humidity FROM weather GROUP BY zip_code;

test_cases.question: List the bike IDs with more than 40 trips.
test_cases.gold_sql: SELECT bike_id, COUNT(*) AS trip_count FROM trip GROUP BY bike_id HAVING COUNT(*) > 40 ORDER BY trip_count DESC;

test_cases.question: How many weather records exist per month across all years?
test_cases.gold_sql: SELECT EXTRACT(MONTH FROM date) AS month, COUNT(*) AS record_count FROM weather GROUP BY month ORDER BY month;

test_cases.question: What is the average dew point range per zip code?
test_cases.gold_sql: SELECT zip_code, ROUND(AVG(max_dew_point_f - min_dew_point_f), 2) AS avg_dew_range FROM weather GROUP BY zip_code;

test_cases.question: How many round trips were made per start station?
test_cases.gold_sql: SELECT start_station_id, COUNT(*) AS round_trips FROM trip WHERE start_station_id = end_station_id GROUP BY start_station_id ORDER BY round_trips DESC;

test_cases.question: What is the average trip duration for trips longer than one hour?
test_cases.gold_sql: SELECT ROUND(AVG(duration), 2) AS avg_duration FROM trip WHERE duration > 3600;

test_cases.question: List the top 5 stations by number of status records.
test_cases.gold_sql: SELECT station_id, COUNT(*) AS record_count FROM status GROUP BY station_id ORDER BY record_count DESC LIMIT 5;

test_cases.question: What is the average maximum temperature for each day of the week?
test_cases.gold_sql: SELECT EXTRACT(DOW FROM date) AS day_of_week, ROUND(AVG(max_temperature_f), 2) AS avg_max_temp FROM weather GROUP BY day_of_week ORDER BY day_of_week;

test_cases.question: How many trips per zip code have a duration greater than 1800 seconds?
test_cases.gold_sql: SELECT zip_code, COUNT(*) AS long_trips FROM trip WHERE duration > 1800 GROUP BY zip_code ORDER BY long_trips DESC;

test_cases.question: What is the average trip duration from each city to San Francisco?
test_cases.gold_sql: SELECT s1.city AS start_city, ROUND(AVG(t.duration), 2) AS avg_duration FROM trip t JOIN station s1 ON t.start_station_id = s1.id JOIN station s2 ON t.end_station_id = s2.id WHERE s2.city = 'San Francisco' GROUP BY s1.city ORDER BY avg_duration DESC;

test_cases.question: Which stations have more subscriber trips than customer trips?
test_cases.gold_sql: SELECT s.name, COUNT(CASE WHEN t.subscription_type = 'Subscriber' THEN 1 END) AS subscriber_count, COUNT(CASE WHEN t.subscription_type = 'Customer' THEN 1 END) AS customer_count FROM trip t JOIN station s ON t.start_station_id = s.id GROUP BY s.name HAVING COUNT(CASE WHEN t.subscription_type = 'Subscriber' THEN 1 END) > COUNT(CASE WHEN t.subscription_type = 'Customer' THEN 1 END) ORDER BY subscriber_count DESC;

test_cases.question: Find the top 5 station pairs with the most trips between them.
test_cases.gold_sql: SELECT s1.name AS start_station, s2.name AS end_station, COUNT(t.id) AS trip_count FROM trip t JOIN station s1 ON t.start_station_id = s1.id JOIN station s2 ON t.end_station_id = s2.id GROUP BY s1.name, s2.name ORDER BY trip_count DESC LIMIT 5;

test_cases.question: What is the average trip duration when it was foggy versus clear weather?
test_cases.gold_sql: SELECT CASE WHEN w.events ILIKE '%fog%' THEN 'Foggy' ELSE 'Clear' END AS weather_type, ROUND(AVG(t.duration), 2) AS avg_duration FROM trip t JOIN weather w ON t.zip_code = w.zip_code AND CAST(t.start_date AS DATE) = w.date GROUP BY weather_type;

test_cases.question: For each city, what percentage of all trips start from that city?
test_cases.gold_sql: SELECT s.city, ROUND(COUNT(t.id) * 100.0 / (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM trip), 2) AS trip_percentage FROM trip t JOIN station s ON t.start_station_id = s.id GROUP BY s.city ORDER BY trip_percentage DESC;

test_cases.question: What is the average trip duration for trips starting from stations with more than 20 docks?
test_cases.gold_sql: SELECT ROUND(AVG(t.duration), 2) AS avg_duration FROM trip t JOIN station s ON t.start_station_id = s.id WHERE s.dock_count > 20;

test_cases.question: Which cities had trips on days with temperatures above 85 degrees?
test_cases.gold_sql: SELECT DISTINCT s.city FROM trip t JOIN station s ON t.start_station_id = s.id JOIN weather w ON t.zip_code = w.zip_code AND CAST(t.start_date AS DATE) = w.date WHERE w.max_temperature_f > 85;

test_cases.question: What is the total number of trips per city pair, including only pairs with more than 100 trips?
test_cases.gold_sql: SELECT s1.city AS start_city, s2.city AS end_city, COUNT(t.id) AS trip_count FROM trip t JOIN station s1 ON t.start_station_id = s1.id JOIN station s2 ON t.end_station_id = s2.id GROUP BY s1.city, s2.city HAVING COUNT(t.id) > 100 ORDER BY trip_count DESC;

test_cases.question: For each station, what is the dock utilization rate (average bikes available divided by dock count)?
test_cases.gold_sql: SELECT s.name, s.dock_count, ROUND(AVG(st.bikes_available), 2) AS avg_bikes, ROUND(ROUND(AVG(st.bikes_available), 2) * 100.0 / s.dock_count, 2) AS utilization_pct FROM status st JOIN station s ON st.station_id = s.id GROUP BY s.name, s.dock_count ORDER BY utilization_pct DESC;

test_cases.question: Which start station had the most trips on rainy days?
test_cases.gold_sql: SELECT s.name, COUNT(t.id) AS trip_count FROM trip t JOIN station s ON t.start_station_id = s.id JOIN weather w ON t.zip_code = w.zip_code AND CAST(t.start_date AS DATE) = w.date WHERE w.events ILIKE '%rain%' GROUP BY s.name ORDER BY trip_count DESC LIMIT 1;

test_cases.question: What is the average trip duration per month for inter-city trips?
test_cases.gold_sql: SELECT EXTRACT(MONTH FROM t.start_date) AS month, ROUND(AVG(t.duration), 2) AS avg_duration FROM trip t JOIN station s1 ON t.start_station_id = s1.id JOIN station s2 ON t.end_station_id = s2.id WHERE s1.city != s2.city GROUP BY month ORDER BY month;

test_cases.question: Find the stations that have never been used as a trip start station.
test_cases.gold_sql: SELECT s.id, s.name FROM station s WHERE NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM trip t WHERE t.start_station_id = s.id);

test_cases.question: What is the average daily trip count for each city?
test_cases.gold_sql: SELECT s.city, ROUND(COUNT(t.id) * 1.0 / COUNT(DISTINCT CAST(t.start_date AS DATE)), 2) AS avg_daily_trips FROM trip t JOIN station s ON t.start_station_id = s.id GROUP BY s.city ORDER BY avg_daily_trips DESC;

test_cases.question: Find the top 3 cities by average trip duration for subscriber trips only.
test_cases.gold_sql: SELECT s.city, ROUND(AVG(t.duration), 2) AS avg_duration FROM trip t JOIN station s ON t.start_station_id = s.id WHERE t.subscription_type = 'Subscriber' GROUP BY s.city ORDER BY avg_duration DESC LIMIT 3;

test_cases.question: What is the total number of round trips per city?
test_cases.gold_sql: SELECT s.city, COUNT(t.id) AS round_trips FROM trip t JOIN station s ON t.start_station_id = s.id WHERE t.start_station_id = t.end_station_id GROUP BY s.city ORDER BY round_trips DESC;

test_cases.question: Which station had the highest ratio of customer to subscriber trips?
test_cases.gold_sql: SELECT s.name, ROUND(COUNT(CASE WHEN t.subscription_type = 'Customer' THEN 1 END) * 1.0 / NULLIF(COUNT(CASE WHEN t.subscription_type = 'Subscriber' THEN 1 END), 0), 2) AS customer_ratio FROM trip t JOIN station s ON t.start_station_id = s.id GROUP BY s.name ORDER BY customer_ratio DESC LIMIT 1;

test_cases.question: Find the average trip duration for each start-end city pair.
test_cases.gold_sql: SELECT s1.city AS start_city, s2.city AS end_city, ROUND(AVG(t.duration), 2) AS avg_duration FROM trip t JOIN station s1 ON t.start_station_id = s1.id JOIN station s2 ON t.end_station_id = s2.id GROUP BY s1.city, s2.city ORDER BY avg_duration DESC;

test_cases.question: How many trips occurred on days with maximum wind speed above 30 mph?
test_cases.gold_sql: SELECT COUNT(t.id) AS trip_count FROM trip t JOIN weather w ON t.zip_code = w.zip_code AND CAST(t.start_date AS DATE) = w.date WHERE w.max_wind_speed_mph > 30;

test_cases.question: Which station pair has the longest average trip duration?
test_cases.gold_sql: SELECT s1.name AS start_station, s2.name AS end_station, ROUND(AVG(t.duration), 2) AS avg_duration FROM trip t JOIN station s1 ON t.start_station_id = s1.id JOIN station s2 ON t.end_station_id = s2.id GROUP BY s1.name, s2.name ORDER BY avg_duration DESC LIMIT 1;

test_cases.question: For each weather event type, how many distinct stations had trips start on days with that event?
test_cases.gold_sql: SELECT w.events, COUNT(DISTINCT t.start_station_id) AS station_count FROM trip t JOIN weather w ON t.zip_code = w.zip_code AND CAST(t.start_date AS DATE) = w.date WHERE w.events IS NOT NULL AND w.events != '' GROUP BY w.events ORDER BY station_count DESC;

test_cases.question: What is the monthly trend of trip count and average duration for San Francisco stations?
test_cases.gold_sql: SELECT EXTRACT(MONTH FROM t.start_date) AS month, COUNT(t.id) AS trip_count, ROUND(AVG(t.duration), 2) AS avg_duration FROM trip t JOIN station s ON t.start_station_id = s.id WHERE s.city = 'San Francisco' GROUP BY month ORDER BY month;

test_cases.question: What is the average temperature on the top 10 busiest trip days in zip code 94107?
test_cases.gold_sql: SELECT w.date, w.mean_temperature_f, sub.trip_count FROM weather w JOIN (SELECT CAST(t.start_date AS DATE) AS trip_date, COUNT(*) AS trip_count FROM trip t WHERE t.zip_code = '94107' GROUP BY trip_date ORDER BY trip_count DESC LIMIT 10) sub ON w.date = sub.trip_date AND w.zip_code = '94107' ORDER BY sub.trip_count DESC;

test_cases.question: For each station, calculate the average bikes available on weekdays versus weekends.
test_cases.gold_sql: SELECT s.name, ROUND(AVG(CASE WHEN EXTRACT(DOW FROM st.time::TIMESTAMP) IN (0, 6) THEN st.bikes_available END), 2) AS weekend_avg, ROUND(AVG(CASE WHEN EXTRACT(DOW FROM st.time::TIMESTAMP) NOT IN (0, 6) THEN st.bikes_available END), 2) AS weekday_avg FROM status st JOIN station s ON st.station_id = s.id GROUP BY s.name ORDER BY s.name;

test_cases.question: What is the total number of subscriber trips from Mountain View to San Francisco?
test_cases.gold_sql: SELECT COUNT(t.id) AS trip_count FROM trip t JOIN station s1 ON t.start_station_id = s1.id JOIN station s2 ON t.end_station_id = s2.id WHERE s1.city = 'Mountain View' AND s2.city = 'San Francisco' AND t.subscription_type = 'Subscriber';

test_cases.question: Find the top 3 stations with the highest dock utilization rate.
test_cases.gold_sql: SELECT s.name, s.dock_count, ROUND(AVG(st.bikes_available), 2) AS avg_bikes, ROUND(AVG(st.bikes_available), 2) * 100.0 / s.dock_count AS utilization_pct FROM status st JOIN station s ON st.station_id = s.id GROUP BY s.name, s.dock_count ORDER BY utilization_pct DESC LIMIT 3;

test_cases.question: What is the average trip duration by temperature category: cold below 55, mild 55 to 75, and hot above 75?
test_cases.gold_sql: SELECT CASE WHEN w.mean_temperature_f < 55 THEN 'Cold' WHEN w.mean_temperature_f BETWEEN 55 AND 75 THEN 'Mild' ELSE 'Hot' END AS temp_category, ROUND(AVG(t.duration), 2) AS avg_duration FROM trip t JOIN weather w ON t.zip_code = w.zip_code AND CAST(t.start_date AS DATE) = w.date GROUP BY temp_category ORDER BY avg_duration;

test_cases.question: Which city pair had the most subscriber trips?
test_cases.gold_sql: SELECT s1.city AS start_city, s2.city AS end_city, COUNT(t.id) AS trip_count FROM trip t JOIN station s1 ON t.start_station_id = s1.id JOIN station s2 ON t.end_station_id = s2.id WHERE t.subscription_type = 'Subscriber' GROUP BY s1.city, s2.city ORDER BY trip_count DESC LIMIT 1;

test_cases.question: What is the average trip count per station for each city?
test_cases.gold_sql: SELECT s.city, ROUND(COUNT(t.id) * 1.0 / COUNT(DISTINCT s.id), 2) AS avg_trips_per_station FROM trip t JOIN station s ON t.start_station_id = s.id GROUP BY s.city ORDER BY avg_trips_per_station DESC;

test_cases.question: Find stations where the average bikes available exceeds the average docks available.
test_cases.gold_sql: SELECT s.name, ROUND(AVG(st.bikes_available), 2) AS avg_bikes, ROUND(AVG(st.docks_available), 2) AS avg_docks FROM status st JOIN station s ON st.station_id = s.id GROUP BY s.name HAVING ROUND(AVG(st.bikes_available), 2) > ROUND(AVG(st.docks_available), 2) ORDER BY avg_bikes DESC;

test_cases.question: What is the average trip duration for each hour of the day for trips starting in San Francisco?
test_cases.gold_sql: SELECT EXTRACT(HOUR FROM t.start_date::TIMESTAMP) AS hour, ROUND(AVG(t.duration), 2) AS avg_duration FROM trip t JOIN station s ON t.start_station_id = s.id WHERE s.city = 'San Francisco' GROUP BY hour ORDER BY hour;
